creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, just thought I'd comment on this PR.  To answer your question: possibly 
because some committers are reluctant to add a new port for a couple patches 
to something that's already in the ports tree.  It's a lot easier to ask 
whoever makes the ArsDigita patches to get them integrated, particularly 
from the namespace point of view.  If they say yes, then we don't need an 
extra port.  If they say no, it's more justification to add it. 

That said, has there been any change WRT this port since it was submitted? 

Apologies that no one has responded so far (apparently).
